MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alex G. Tovarian, Esq., of the Law Offices of Alex Tovarian, Tel. 415.984.9990, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DIANA GOROVICH'S MOTION TO STRIKE ALEX GERSHTEYN'S CROSS COMPLAINT is Granted with ten days leave to file a cross-complaint in compliance with Code of Civil Procedure 428.40. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
